brake_performance.label: No brake judder/steering shake at high speed
brake_performance.helperText: Test firm braking from ~100 km/h; steering vibration can indicate warped rotors.

clutch_wear.label: Clutch pedal effort and travel are healthy
clutch_wear.helperText: Crysta clutch is naturally heavier, but rock-hard pedal can signal replacement due.

steering_vibration_60_80.label: Steering kickback and resonance check
steering_vibration_60_80.helperText: Check for steering dance on rough roads and drone around 1800 RPM.

rust.label: No rust near underbody crossmembers and rear floor
rust.helperText: Inspect underbody and rear floor seams, especially for coastal vehicles.

question.label: Gear lever vibration is within acceptable limit
question.helperText: Some vibration is normal on MT, excessive dancing indicates mount wear.

question.label: DPF/AdBlue warning status (2021+ focus)
question.helperText: Check MID for DPF bars or warning. Persistent warning can need forced regen/service.

question.label: Mudguards and clips are intact
question.helperText: Cracked or missing mudguards are common after rough-road compression.

question.label: No bends on alloy rims (especially 17-inch trims)
question.helperText: Inspect inner barrel for bends/cracks from pothole impact.

question.label: Passenger footwell is dry (AC drain check)
question.helperText: Touch carpet under passenger mat for dampness from clogged AC drain.

question.label: Dashboard/trim is rattle-free
question.helperText: Early batches may show trim rattle near glovebox and center stack.

question.label: No driveline clunk on take-off/gear change
question.helperText: Rear thud can indicate propeller shaft greasing need or U-joint wear.

question.label: Spare wheel and lock mechanism verified
question.helperText: Confirm spare wheel presence underbody and lock operation.
